mapper.sql: select detail_id, task_id, store_id, shop_name, product_id, item_type, item_id, item_name, shopify_id, step, status, error_code, error_field, input_index, error_message, create_time, update_time from erp_shopify_task_detail
mapper.select: select item_type as name, count(1) as total from erp_shopify_task_detail where task_id = #{taskId} group by item_type order by total desc, item_type asc
select status as name, count(1) as total from erp_shopify_task_detail where task_id = #{taskId} group by status order by total desc, status asc

select coalesce(nullif(step, ''), 'UNKNOWN') as name, count(1) as total from erp_shopify_task_detail where task_id = #{taskId} and status in ('FAILED', 'PART_SUCCESS') group by coalesce(nullif(step, ''), 'UNKNOWN') order by total desc, name asc

select error_code as errorCode, error_field as errorField, coalesce(nullif(error_message, ''), '未知错误') as errorMessage, count(1) as total from erp_shopify_task_detail where task_id = #{taskId} and status in ('FAILED', 'PART_SUCCESS') and (error_code is not null or error_field is not null or error_message is not null) group by error_code, error_field, coalesce(nullif(error_message, ''), '未知错误') order by total desc, max(create_time) desc limit #{limit}
mapper.insert:
insert into erp_shopify_task_detail
detail_id, task_id, store_id, shop_name, product_id, item_type, item_id, item_name, shopify_id, step, status, error_code, error_field, input_index, error_message, create_time, update_time,
#{detailId}, #{taskId}, #{storeId}, #{shopName}, #{productId}, #{itemType}, #{itemId}, #{itemName}, #{shopifyId}, #{step}, #{status}, #{errorCode}, #{errorField}, #{inputIndex}, #{errorMessage}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
